title: polypodium ellipticum var. amplum
intro: Polypodium ellipticum var. amplum, also known as Western polypody or large-leaved polypody, is a type of fern species native to North America, characterized by its large, elliptical leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Polypodium ellipticum var. amplum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Polypodium ellipticum var. amplum can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil for its medicinal uses.
